analysis.reasoning: Core message: Trust WHO and scientific experts over 'habitual liars'; propose an international expert investigation trip to the US. This implies skepticism toward unnamed actors (likely Western/US sources) and calls for expert-led inquiry focused on the US. CH1: The tweet implicitly portrays the US/West as untrustworthy ('habitual liars') and calls for scrutiny of the US, fitting the depiction of the West as hostile/deceitful; thus CH1 is supported. CH2: No explicit portrayal of China as benevolent or cooperative internationally; not supported. CH3: No historical narrative; not supported. CH4: No defense of China’s political system or domestic values; not supported. CH5: No claims about CCP governance success; not supported. CH6: Cultural/heritage content absent; not supported. Conclusion: Only CH1 applies.
